timing_note: 7–20 days to departure — award inventory is tight. Act within 24–48 hours.

top_recommendations.availability_note: Spontaneous Escapes promo maintains availability close to departure. Best bet at short notice.
Check multiple dates April 3–10. Try HND as well as NRT.
Aeroplan can unlock partner awards when airline's own program shows sold out.

cash_price_estimates.source: Industry estimates as of March 2026. Verify on Google Flights.

partial_route_options.option: LAX → SIN (premium), then SIN → DPS budget
partial_route_options.verdict: Best strategy — lie-flat for the long haul, cheap last leg

partial_route_options.option: LAX → NRT (ANA business), overnight Tokyo, then NRT → DPS
partial_route_options.verdict: Mini Tokyo stopover option — great if 1 flex day available

hawaiian_alaska_note: Beryl has Hawaiian Airlines HawaiianMiles. Post-merger, these can be transferred to Alaska Mileage Plan. Alaska can book Cathay Pacific business LAX→HKG→DPS at ~70,000 miles OW — check alaskaair.com.
insights: Amex MR → ANA Mileage Club is the highest CPP play at 3.8¢ for business class
KrisFlyer Spontaneous Escapes is the most available option at short notice
Both Amex MR and Chase UR transfer to KrisFlyer and Aeroplan at 1:1 — maximum flexibility
Hawaiian miles merger to Alaska opens Cathay Pacific as a surprise option
April 5–10 window is best — more availability than April 1–3
